## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one preferred?

## Additional Context

Any relevant links, screenshots, or examples from similar tools.
